---
title: "contrast codes"
format: revealjs
---



![](media/dsr2_fig_11_10_contrast_1_weights_01.svg){fig-align="center" height=600}


##

![](media/dsr2_fig_11_10_contrast_1_weights_02.svg){fig-align="center" height=600}

##

![](media/dsr2_fig_11_10_contrast_1_weights_03.svg){fig-align="center" height=600}

##

![](media/dsr2_fig_11_10_contrast_1_weights_04.svg){fig-align="center" height=600}


##

![](media/dsr2_fig_11_10_contrast_1_weights_05.svg){fig-align="center" height=600}


##

![](media/dsr2_fig_11_11_contrast_2_weights_01.svg){fig-align="center" height=600}

##

![](media/dsr2_fig_11_11_contrast_2_weights_02.svg){fig-align="center" height=600}

##

![](media/dsr2_fig_11_11_contrast_2_weights_03.svg){fig-align="center" height=600}

## 

![](media/dsr2_fig_11_11_contrast_2_weights_04.svg){fig-align="center" height=600}

##

![](media/dsr2_fig_11_11_contrast_2_weights_05.svg){fig-align="center" height=600}
